name: ExtensionIngredient_Comment
title: R5: A place for providing any notes that are relevant to the component, e.g. removed during process, adjusted for loss on drying (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Ingredient.comment` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Ingredient.comment` 0..1 `markdown`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `Ingredient.comment` 0..1 `markdown`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Ingredient.comment` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Ingredient` is not mapped.
Element `Ingredient.comment` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
